caption: A man with a tall, peaked grey wig and glasses is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders, and he wears black over-ear headphones. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and posters. A white storage unit and other studio equipment are visible in the background. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a text overlay on the right that says "BOSS TALK 101". As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his head and shoulders while maintaining his position in front of the microphone.
